content: create-next-app latest (v16.2.10) defaults to TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, App Router, and Turbopack enabled, import alias @/*. Interactive prompts cover TypeScript, linter, React Compiler, Tailwind, src/ dir, App Router, import alias. CLI flags: --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --use-npm --yes to skip prompts.
